vehicle.model_designation_position: lower right (from viewer's perspective), to the right of main grille
vehicle.cab_type: high roof sleeper (visible side windows and upright profile)

composition.truck_orientation: facing directly forward towards the camera
composition.important_crop_information: bottom corners of the cab just slightly cropped, but grille, windshield, mirrors and lights all inside view

company_identity.position: top of cab, center, on light blue band, horizontal orientation
company_identity.appearance: blue letters, white background with red company logo left of text

owner_signatures.position: center grille above DAF wordmark, handwritten style black text on white background

roof_lights.position: top front edge of cab roof, evenly spaced, left, center, right

main_headlights.position: lower left and right corners of front, housed in recesses each side of main grille

windshield_contents.position: lower left from viewer's perspective (round green sticker)

front_geometry.grille_description: Five prominent horizontal bars, tapering, silver metallic, integrated with black grilles above and below DAF badge
front_geometry.headlight_description: Rectangular, horizontally elongated, clear lens, multi-segmented with LED elements inside corners of bumper
front_geometry.bumper_description: Wraps across front, main color blue with integrated license plate in center, two light recesses at edges
